questions.question: Peter compares the devil to what?
options: A roaring lion looking for someone to devour
questions.correct: A roaring lion looking for someone to devour
questions.feedback: The devil prowls around like a roaring lion looking for someone to devour.

questions.question: Peter tells elders to shepherd the flock in what manner?
options: Willingly and eagerly, not for dishonest gain
questions.correct: Willingly and eagerly, not for dishonest gain
questions.feedback: Shepherd God's flock willingly and eagerly, not for dishonest gain.

questions.question: Peter says God opposes the proud but shows grace to the humble.
questions.feedback: God opposes the proud but shows grace to the humble.

questions.question: Cast all your _____ on him because he cares for you.
questions.feedback: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.

questions.question: When the Chief _____ appears, you will receive the crown of glory that will never fade away.
questions.feedback: When the Chief Shepherd appears, you will receive an unfading crown of glory.
